Product update · UPD-003

Terrain Environment Producer

Add a deterministic 32px cardinal autotile producer to the same local-first project as the verified character workflow.

TL;DR

3 promises, 8 scenarios, 17 capabilities, 8 task flows, and 28 objective behaviors define this update. Status: implemented.

Approved · implementation authorized

The product owner requested the next bounded MVP scope, complete specification, documentation update, and implementation. Terrain is the roadmap's second producer; scenes, structures, packs, animation, and editor expansion remain excluded.

Customer promises

CP-TERRAIN-CREATE

A developer can create a coherent 32px terrain tileset without drawing every edge and corner manually.

shared implemented

CP-TERRAIN-PROJECT

A developer can keep terrain and character work in one local-first project while each producer retains its own versioned document.

shared implemented

CP-TERRAIN-DELIVERY

A developer can move and export terrain between web and Electron and use it in Godot without manual tile slicing or rule reconstruction.

cross-host implemented

Task flows

IDHostCompletionStatus
TF-TERRAIN-FIRSTsharedOptional terrain is created, inspected, and removable without character driftimplemented
TF-TERRAIN-PAINTsharedPainted map and complete autotile set reflect exact cardinal masksimplemented
TF-TERRAIN-THEMEsharedTerrain matches project mood without changing character semanticsimplemented
TF-TERRAIN-RETURNwebTerrain persists, conflicts safely, and remains usable offlineimplemented
TF-TERRAIN-EXPORTsharedGeneric and Godot terrain packages are complete and creditedimplemented
TF-TERRAIN-DESKTOPdesktopTerrain project and outputs use secure native locationsimplemented
TF-TERRAIN-CROSS-HOSTcross-hostTerrain round trips with exact semantic and output parityimplemented
TF-TERRAIN-COMPATIBILITYsharedTerrain is fail-closed for old hosts and invisible to character-only outputsimplemented

Deliberate exclusions

IDExpectationDisposition
OUT-UPD003-TERRAIN-PACKSInstall or author external terrain packsFuture update after terrain runtime evidence
OUT-UPD003-TRANSITIONSBlend arbitrary pairs of materials in one mapNext terrain expansion from real pair fixtures
OUT-UPD003-WANG47Generate 47-tile blob, quarter-tile, or Wang setsVersioned terrain profile after measured need
OUT-UPD003-ANIMATED-WATERAnimate water, foam, waterfalls, or terrain FXFuture animated terrain update
OUT-UPD003-DECORATORSScatter flowers, pebbles, cracks, foliage, or variation layersTerrain variation update
OUT-UPD003-ARBITRARY-MAPChoose arbitrary map dimensions or import a tilemapScene/composition stage
OUT-UPD003-SCENESPlace characters, structures, and terrain together in an exportable sceneAfter structures/props producer
OUT-UPD003-STRUCTURESGenerate structures, buildings, props, or vegetation objectsNext producer after terrain evidence
OUT-UPD003-LIGHTING-MAPSGenerate normal, specular, emissive, or height mapsPhase 6 material-map update
OUT-UPD003-GLOBAL-TOKENSReplace character tokens with a universal project token vocabularyRevisit after structures producer
OUT-UPD003-NEW-ENGINEAdd Unity, RPG Maker, GameMaker, or another engine adapterSeparate engine-adapter update
OUT-UPD003-PIXEL-EDITORDraw or edit terrain pixels manuallyPhase 6 manual editor

Binding contracts

See product-design-spec.md, engineering-spec.md, quality-scenarios.md, threat-model.md, and release-gate.md in the canonical update directory.
